description: Style NoteElevate your style to become the envy of the fashion crowd with this toniq necklace. Clash them with your season essentials (preferably tonal pastels) for a unique twist. Product DetailsSlim silver strand with black and silver beads spaced evenlyCan be worn as a single or double strand necklaceHas a lobster clasp with adjustable linksMaterial and CareGlass beads, metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 108 cm
